entries.description: Registered S1; read Set 072 change-log + strategy §8, Set 073 §9 + cross-target-comparison, design-consensus-synthesis + both raw consults; confirmed audit table (platform >=0.1.0, harvester >=0.15.0, migration-orchestrator >=0.10.0) against live repos; confirmed verification_only_app CLI matches addendum template.

Authored docs/greenfield-matrix-protocol.md via routed documentation task (gemini-pro); auto-verify caught a cohort-table fidelity Major, fixed; corrected invented anchor links, de-anachronized metadata example, added provider-x-surface arm scoring-unit clarification.

Finalized ai_router/prompt-templates/greenfield-matrix-addendum.md (reusable instruction block) and routed docs/greenfield-adjudication-rubric.md (TP/FP/dup/unclear defs + per-arm scoring table); tightened arm-vs-cell terminology + removed a non-roster example row.

Created telemetry/ skeleton: telemetry/README.md (D5 layout + required metadata.json contract + cohort), and per-repo placeholders for dabbler-platform (lead) and dabbler-access-harvester (supporting). migration-orchestrator excluded (D4), no dir.

routed_gate REQUIRED (cross-artifact + multi-module + breadth 9); cross-provider session-verification (openai/gpt-5.4) converged VERIFIED over 4 substantive rounds (R1 2 Major+1 Minor; R2 2 new; R3 1 terminology Major; R4 clean) -- each round a real fix, no churn. Wrote disposition.json (verdict VERIFIED), s1-next-session.md, cited 11 lessons. Ready to commit+push+close (non-final).
